_comment: OPTIONAL. resolve-config.sh auto-detects package manager (lockfile), layout (monorepo vs flat), and mobile presence — most apps need NO config file. Add this only to override a detection. Copy to <repo-root>/.mstack/config.json and delete the keys you don't override. Values below show the monorepo defaults.
_flatLayoutExample: A flat single-app repo auto-resolves to: designTokens=src/config/design.ts, globalsCss=src/app/globals.css, brandSource=src/config/brand.ts, webApp=., mobileApp=null. Override here only if your paths differ.
